reason: The S operator in Phi_S(rho) = Tr_unobs(S rho S†) is never specified to be unitary or isometric. For Phi_S to be CPTP, S must satisfy S†S = I (isometry). In QFT, the S-matrix is unitary on the full Fock space, but restriction to a fixed-particle-number sector need not be. Without an explicit assumption that S is an isometry from H_in to H_det tensor H_unobs, the claim that Phi_S is CPTP is unjustified.
